ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "subtitle" TEXT /* Subtitle of the publication */,
  "pub_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition number */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publishing company */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the publication */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the publication */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the publication */,
  "cover_type" TEXT /* Type of cover */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the author's website */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Full name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the artist's website */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pub_authors" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pub_artists" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of copies sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "royalties" (
  "royalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each royalty payment */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication generating the royalty */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author receiving the royalty */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist receiving the royalty */,
  "royalty_date" TEXT /* Date the royalty was paid */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the royalty payment */,
  "contract_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the contract */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("royalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_royalties_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_royalties_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_royalties_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., author, artist, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflow" (
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow entry */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being tracked */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Current stage of the publication (e.g., editorial, design, production) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., in_progress, completed) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the workflow was last updated */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Name of the person responsible for the current stage */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the current stage */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the workflow stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflow_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)
